zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD处于高位回落后的横盘整理结构，价格受制于1767附近SMA20均线压制，短线偏弱震荡。整体仍在MA20下方运行，多头动能不足。反弹受限。区间

MACD指标维持负值区域，动能柱缩窄但仍未翻正，空头优势略占主导，趋势修复信号较弱。RSI暂缺但短线强度偏弱。多周期未共振。谨慎观望波动

支撑位关注1724及1720一带，若跌破可能下探1700整数关口；上方阻力在1768与1800区域，突破需放量确认。信号待观察。

操作上建议暂以区间思路为主，高位不追多，接近支撑可轻仓试多，若跌破1720应及时止损观望。等待方向选择后再跟随。控制风险为主。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETHUSD is trading around 1744 after a modest 0.40% daily gain, reflecting a short-term stabilization following recent downside pressure. Despite intraday strength near 1745, the broader structure remains slightly bearish as price holds below the 20-day SMA at 1767.97. This positioning suggests the market is attempting a recovery within a corrective phase rather than initiating a sustained uptrend. Overall momentum is neutral-to-cautious phase consolidation.

The MACD reading of -10.57 continues to signal downside momentum dominance, although the absence of a signal line value limits full crossover assessment. Price action near recent highs suggests short-term buyers are active, but conviction remains limited. Without RSI confirmation, momentum clarity is reduced, leaving traders reliant on MACD slope and price structure. Overall momentum bias still leans slightly bearish but stabilizing.

Immediate support is located at 1724.21, aligning with the 24-hour low and acting as the first defensive zone for bulls. A break below this level could expose the psychological 1700 area, where stronger demand may emerge. On the upside, resistance is seen at 1745.49, followed by the 20-day SMA near 1767.97, which remains a key dynamic barrier for trend recovery and continuation.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy with a slight bearish bias. Long positions may be considered near 1724 with tight risk controls, targeting rebounds toward 1745 and 1768. Conversely, rejection at resistance could offer short opportunities. A sustained breakout above the 20-day SMA would be required to confirm trend reversal, while a break below 1724 would strengthen downside continuation risks toward 1700.
